name: Cursor
project_binding_recipe: Bind the repo in HASP once. HASP may create neutral aliases internally, but day-to-day agent use should prefer named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY.
approval_path: Prefer the wrapper or launcher path, then let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session and use project-scoped and time-boxed leases for long Cursor runs; hasp session grant-plaintext is the operator path when plaintext is explicitly required.
safe_inject_path: Use hasp_run or hasp_inject via the stdio tool server, preferably with named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY instead of recalling secret_01 or revealing plaintext.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env for workspace-visible env files when convenience beats the safer path.
